title: selaginella barbata
intro: Selaginella barbata, also known as sloughwort or spiny spike moss, is a type of ancient, small, evergreen plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella barbata include reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often dried and made into teas or infused in hot water to harness its medicinal properties.
